title: frame
text: frame A layout object in a form or report that groups information on the component to improve readability, or provides specific functionality, such as inserting a page break in print output. Related Links line frame A horizontal or vertical line painted on a component, equivalent to an area frame that has a depth or width of zero, drawn through the middle of a character cell. area frame A development object that can be used to group, separate, or decorate the contents of a form or report component. header frame A frame that appears at the top of each page when a form or report is printed. footer frame A frame that appears at the bottom of each page when printing a form or report. named area frame An area frame that defines logical unit in a form or report component. It can be used to format data, or add and protect text. break frame An optional frame in reports, that is activated by the printbreak ProcScript statement. It is used to show temporary variable information, such as the current date, page number, and so on. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
